'''âdh-t-p-b''' ('''kadhatpeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:culturalise|culturalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:culturalise|culturalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-t-p-b
|-
! Lemma
| kadhatpeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhatpeboko|thidhatpeboko]] || [[word:jidhatpeboko|jidhatpeboko]] || [[word:shidhatpeboko|shidhatpeboko]] || [[word:kidhatpeboko|kidhatpeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhatpeboko|thuthudhatpeboko]] || [[word:jujudhatpeboko|jujudhatpeboko]] || [[word:shushudhatpeboko|shushudhatpeboko]] || [[word:kukudhatpeboko|kukudhatpeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhatpeboko|thodhatpeboko]] || [[word:jodhatpeboko|jodhatpeboko]] || [[word:shodhatpeboko|shodhatpeboko]] || [[word:kodhatpeboko|kodhatpeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhatpeboko|thĂŠdhatpeboko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhatpeboko|jĂŠdhatpeboko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhatpeboko|shĂŠdhatpeboko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhatpeboko|kĂŠdhatpeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
